name: lskat
description: Lieutnant Skat (from German “Offiziersskat”) is a fun and engaging card game for two players, where the second player is either live opponent, or built in artificial intelligence. You can also play and test an online demo version of this game. This game is part of the KDE Games suite. USAGE (from the command line): kdegames -h (shows the list of games) kdegames $GAME (launches the selected game)
